---
title: "California Summer School for the Arts"
subtitle: "Generative AI in Arts Education --- Problems & Opportunities"
date: 7/14/2026

author:
  name: "Carsten Lange"
  email: "clange@cpp.edu"
  affiliation: "Department of Economics, Cal Poly, Pomona"

execute:
  message: false
  warning: false

format: 
  revealjs:
    background-transition: fade
    audio:
      loop: false
    warning: false
    controls: true
    chalkboard:
      theme: whiteboard
      boardmarker-width: 2.7
    incremental: false
    scrollable: true
    footer: "<a href=https://ai.lange-analytics.com</a> "
---

## Stylized Example: Time travel with a TV to the year 1885 {.smaller}

::: {.column width="40%"}
**Perception**

-   Excitement

-   Little artificial people inside the box are staging a play
:::

::: {.column width="58%"}
![Generated with ChatGPT](WesternFlat2D.png){fig-alt="A TV displaying a western"}
:::

## Stylized Example: Time travel with a TV to the year 1885 {.smaller}

::: {.column width="40%"}
**Dangers without Technology Background**

-   What if something gets out of the TV box

-   ~~People watch to much TV and do not socialize enough~~
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![Generated with ChatGPT](WesternFlyingBullets.png){fig-alt="A TV displaying a western with bullets flying out of it"}
:::

## Stylized Example: Time travel with a TV to the year 1885 {.smaller}

::: {.column width="42%"}
**Dangers with Technology Background**

TVs are just an arrangement of millions of colored pixels and our eye/brain processes them to a picture

-   ~~What if something gets out of the TV box~~

-   **People watch to much TV and do not socialize enough**
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
![Generated with ChatGPT](WesternPixels.png){fig-alt="A TV displaying a western with bullets flying out of it"}
:::

## How Generative AI (GenAI) Works in 3 Minutes

### Coding Words with Meaning - Embedding

![](ComputerCantDoNumbers.png){width="230"}

```{=html}
<table border="1">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th></th>
      <th><strong>King</strong></th>
      <th><strong>Queen</strong></th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Noun</strong></td>
      <td>---</td>
      <td>---</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Female</strong></td>
      <td>---</td>
      <td>---</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Royal</strong></td>
      <td>---</td>
      <td>---</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## How Generative AI (GenAI) Works in 3 Minutes

### Coding Words with Meaning - Embedding

![](ComputerCantDoNumbers.png){width="230"}

```{=html}
<table border="1">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th></th>
      <th><strong>King</strong></th>
      <th><strong>Queen</strong></th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Noun</strong></td>
      <td>1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Female</strong></td>
      <td>---</td>
      <td>---</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Royal</strong></td>
      <td>---</td>
      <td>---</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## How Generative AI (GenAI) Works in 3 Minutes

### Coding Words with Meaning - Embedding

![](ComputerCantDoNumbers.png){width="230"}

```{=html}
<table border="1">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th></th>
      <th><strong>King</strong></th>
      <th><strong>Queen</strong></th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Noun</strong></td>
      <td>1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Female</strong></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Royal</strong></td>
      <td>---</td>
      <td>---</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## How Generative AI (GenAI) Works in 3 Minutes

### Coding Words with Meaning - Embedding

![](ComputerCantDoNumbers.png){width="230"}

```{=html}
<table border="1">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th></th>
      <th><strong>King</strong></th>
      <th><strong>Queen</strong></th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Noun</strong></td>
      <td>1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Female</strong></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Royal</strong></td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>0.8</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## How Generative AI (GenAI) Works in 3 Minutes

### Coding Words with Meaning - Embedding with AI Categories

![](ComputerCantDoNumbers.png){width="230"}

```{=html}
<table border="1">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th></th>
      <th><strong>King</strong></th>
      <th><strong>Queen</strong></th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Category #1</strong></td>
      <td>3876</td>
      <td>925</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Category #2</strong></td>
      <td>7189</td>
      <td>2636</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>. . .</strong></td>
      <td>. . .</td>
      <td>. . .</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Category #10124</strong></td>
      <td>34234</td>
      <td>8567</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```
## Problems & Opportunities

-   Dealing with Cheating
-   Using *genAI* to Support Teaching
-   Teaching *genAI* Design
-   Learning with standalone *genAI* (teach me how to ...)

## Cheating in Homeworks and Quizzes

`Cheating is not new in academia, but the ease it can be done with genAI is new!`

**Examples:**

-   Write a paper about the civil war
-   [Cheating related to take-home and online quizzes](https://econ.lange-analytics.com/HomeworkQLive/HW6061/HW6061.html){target="_blank"} <br> (Google Lens is in "Hamburger Menu" -\> Search with Lens)

## Cheating in Homeworks and Quizzes {.smaller}

`We need to be creative! We need to fight technology with technology!`<br> `Restrictions are not helping!`<br><br>

**A few ideas:**<br>

**Small Grade Weights:** Assign small weights to take-home assignments and online quizzes

**Strict University Policies for midterm and final proctoring:**

-   Phone drops etc.
-   `Screen monitoring` for online work in our labs
-   `Lock-Down` browser like 'Respondus'
-   `Proctoring Centers` for (a limited amount of) homeworks and online quizzes. Computers can be very basic.

## Using `genAI` to Support Teaching {.smaller}

`Cheating Allowed:` Students prepare assignments at home with *genAI* and finalize them in a proctored environment in class without *genAI*

**Examples:**

-   **Paper about Civil War**
    -   students prepare the papers at home with the use of genAI and they report about the process
    -   instructor reads papers before class but does not provide the feedback before the class session
    -   students finish the paper without AI in a proctored environment

. . .

-   **Statistics and Econometrics**

    -   students analyze data with statistical tools like *R* at home with the use of *genAI* and report about the process
    -   instructor reviews the research before class but does not provide the feedback before the class session
    -   during a proctored class session students are asked to improve or extend the research determined by the instructor

. . .

**Course Assistants**<br> (You login to your `Cal Poly ChatGPT` account and then email [clange\@cpp.edu](mailto:clange@cpp.edu) )

E.g., [EC 4447/5558 - Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning for Economic Research](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-6827f51eb67c819183c5a25885e226a3-machlearn-course-exp-possibly-wrong-answers){target="_blank"}

## Teaching `genAI` Design

<br> (**X** To use the GPTs you must first login to your `Cal Poly ChatGPT` account and then email [clange\@cpp.edu](mailto:clange@cpp.edu))

-   [The Art of Thinking --- challenge, answer or expanded Philosophy topics](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-69e1a37155e48191bc3590359b82c066-the-art-of-thinking){target="_blank"}
-   [Bronco Broject Advisor](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-6a02b1c041e481918eb84471103b0e55-broncoproject-advisor){target="_blank"}
-   [The Last Word --- I never lost an argument](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-69e19d1be73c819193e1ca63d74f0548-the-last-word){target="_blank"} **XX**

## `genAI` Learning (teach me how to ...)

`Use Flipped Classroom (this is an old concept) where genAI, textbooks, and videos teach the basics and the instructor focusses on higher skills in the classroom`

-   fact and skills learning at home
    -   use *genAI*: please teach me about ... (example follows)
    -   students use textbooks or videos to verify what they learned from *Gemini*
-   higher skills and questions are covered in the classroom

## `genAI` Learning (Teach me about Mean and Median)

::::: columns
::: {.column width="33%"}
![](GeminiScreen.PNG){width="222"}
:::

::: {.column width="67%"}
-   The following is based on a *Gemini Learning* conversation
-   To be visually more appealing two avatars were added with *genAI*.
    -   a cartoon character asking the questions
    -   a *wise man* (a *desert hermit brewer* from *HeyGen*)

**Note: The Gemini phone app was used entirely audio-based (2:30).**
:::
:::::

## `genAI` Learning (Teach me about Mean and Median)

![](ClangePicCarton.png){width="371"}

<audio controls data-autoplay src="1IntroQuestion.wav">

</audio>

## `genAI` Learning (teach me about Mean and Median)

![](2Welcome.mp4){width="1111" controls="true" data-autoplay="true"}

## `genAI` Learning (Teach me about Mean and Median)

![](ClangePicCarton.png){width="371"}

<audio controls data-autoplay src="3PleaseStartMean.wav">

</audio>

## `genAI` Learning (teach me about Mean and Median)

![](4ExampleMean.mp4){width="1111" controls="true" data-autoplay="true"}

## `genAI` Learning (Teach me about Mean and Median)

![](ClangePicCarton.png){width="371"}

<audio controls data-autoplay src="5StartMedian.wav">

</audio>

## `genAI` Learning (teach me about Mean and Median)

![](6MedianExplained.mp4){width="1111" controls="true" data-autoplay="true"}

## `genAI` Learning (Teach me about Mean and Median)

![](ClangePicCarton.png){width="371"}

<audio controls data-autoplay src="7AskToRepaetMedian.wav">

</audio>

## `genAI` Learning (teach me about Mean and Median)

![](8MedianAgainWithExample.mp4){width="1111" controls="true" data-autoplay="true"}

## `genAI` Learning (Teach me about Mean and Median)

![](ClangePicCarton.png){width="371"}

<audio controls data-autoplay src="9ConfirmMedian.wav">

</audio>

## `genAI` Learning (teach me about Mean and Median)

![](10ConfirmMedianOK.mp4){width="1111" controls="true" data-autoplay="true"}

## `genAI` Learning (teach me about Mean and Median)

<br> **genAI will not substitute instructors!**

**genAI will allow us to focus on higher skills, something we always wanted!**

## Thank You All

The slides are available at:

[https://tinyurl.com/CAFESummerInstitute2026](https://tinyurl.com/CAFESummerInstitute2026){target="_blank"}
